rag_rules: Repair AGREE diagnostics by ensuring visible identifiers are used and type mismatches are resolved.
Do not introduce package-qualified or undefined identifiers in AGREE annexes.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts.
Ensure type consistency between declarations and expressions in AGREE.
Place component type contracts in component type scopes, not implementations.
Avoid referencing AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
anti_patterns: Do not add undefined or package-qualified identifiers to fix diagnostics.
Do not assume AADL property names are automatically available in AGREE scope.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about package or property set visibility
